description_long: This is a realistic model of a crab, featuring a broad, oval-shaped carapace with a slightly rough texture and muted brown and beige coloration. The crab has two prominent, asymmetrical claws (chelae), with one noticeably larger than the other, both extending outward from the front of the body. Its legs are slender and jointed, with a total of eight visible walking legs arranged symmetrically on either side of the body. The eyes are positioned on short stalks at the front of the carapace, giving the crab a wide field of vision. Subtle color variations, including hints of pink and cream, are visible on the claws and legs, adding to the naturalistic appearance. The overall form and detailing suggest a species commonly found in coastal or urban seafood markets.
description: A lifelike crab with a broad, oval carapace, two large asymmetrical claws, and eight slender legs, featuring natural brown, beige, and pink hues.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crab's broad carapace, both claws extended, and eyes on short stalks.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the larger claw raised upward and the segmentation of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the underside of the crab and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view with the smaller claw more visible and the carapace's curvature apparent.
